CustomField.description: This value rolls up all approved Billing Adjustment credits (excluding those with status Cancelled, Pending, Declined, or Submitted for Approval). Used to reflect corrections to the invoiced amount. Reduces the Total invoiced amount by first reducing the Adjusted Invoiced Amount.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Displays the total amount of Billing Adjustment Credit Memos applied to this invoice. Used to reflect corrections to the Total Invoiced Amount.
CustomField.label: Billing Adj Credit Applied
